insight: Uruguay's performance after hydration breaks in the 2026 World Cup has been underwhelming, as they failed to gain momentum in both of their breaks, with a mean change of -0.100 minutes per minute, indicating a slight decline in their performance. This trend holds true whether they were pressing before the break or not, as they maintained an average change of -0.100 minutes per minute in both scenarios, and were unable to keep momentum going after the break when they did press.
